title: Request for Documents with reminders
excerpt:

posts.author: Jarv (Ian Jarvie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to request a bespoke list of documents from my clients and have automations chase them until I have marked off as received and accepted.

I currently have a generic Form for a pre-set list of documents (income proof, bank statements, client ID etc) that then stores in a board with a link that then shows the form fills to my client board but I am trying to see if there is any workaround to create a bespoke request where I can then set automations and integrations to send email and SMS chasers to the client every few days until the requested file has been uploaded.

Has anyone created such a process?
